name: bg-animate-button-demo
visual_summary: This component is a collection of animated background buttons, which can be customized with various gradients, roundings, and animations. It is typically used to showcase button variations in a demo or documentation context.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready component-demo component with the following characteristics:

Name: bg-animate-button-demo
Description: This component is a collection of animated background buttons, which can be customized with various gradients, roundings, and animations. It is typically used to showcase button variations in a demo or documentation context.
Style: customizable
Interactions: animated
Tags: button, animation, component-demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
